analysis: The week started rough — four hours on the 22nd, five on the 23rd with nearly three hours lying awake, which is a lot to sit through — but you pulled it back hard. The 25th and 26th were genuinely good nights, seven twenty-two and a full eight hours, and your last three nights have been landing consistently in the six-to-seven range, which is your body finding a rhythm. Your deep sleep is still on the quieter side most nights, that 27-minute dip on the 26th especially, but your REM has been solid and your awake time on the 28th was only twenty-six minutes, which means the wind-down stack is doing something real. You're not at eight-thirty every night yet but the direction of travel this week is genuinely hot.
